message:
fix(node): NaN/Inf guards in BPET economic integration, saturating_add in diagnostic_registry

- economic_integration.rs: single_observation_score() had 3 of 4 risk
  components silently treating NaN as "healthy" (zero risk) via f64::NAN.max(0.0)
  semantics. Added is_finite() guards with fail-closed defaults on all
  observation fields. Also guarded compromise_propensity() trend computation
  and CompromisePricing::compute() inputs.
- diagnostic_registry.rs: regime_boost_until timestamp arithmetic used raw +
  which could theoretically overflow u64; replaced with saturating_add().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
